E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E2 - JJ's Fun Learning Fundamentals!
programme.desc: It's time to learn the fundamentals with JJ! Join him & his friends as they practice their numbers by counting baby chicks with Grandpa & singing about five little monkeys jumping on the bed. Then, it's time to learn about colors! Watch as the kids paint plain toy cars with a splash of color & help Ms. Appleberry mix primary colors with jello to make secondary colors. From learning shapes to making yummy rainbow popsicles, this adventure is full of learning fun!

programme.title: E10 - Sleepy Time with Twinkle
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate showdown between Arpo & his arch-nemesis, the Squirrel! The trouble multiplies when the squirrel uses a ray gun to create an army of clones that fills the house. Then, the battle for food continues as the squirrel tries to steal a freshly baked apple pie & tasty food from a picnic BBQ. The showdown gets truly bizarre when the squirrel gets trapped inside Arpo & takes control of the robot's body, causing all sorts of confusing chaos for the family!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E7 - Scoring Goals & Celebrations
programme.desc: Get ready to move and score with JJ and friends! Join a huge family soccer match, then test your speed with the 'Head, Shoulders, Knees, and Toes' dance. Afterward, hit the beach for a fun game of Freeze Dance and celebrate your victory!

programme.title: E1 - An Ultimate Animal Adventure!
programme.desc: Blippi is wondering about animals on an ultimate adventure! Join Blippi & his robot friend FETCH as they travel the world to get their questions answered. How high can a kangaroo jump? Blippi finds out in a hopping race in Australia! How do bats see in the dark? A new bat friend shows him all about echolocation! The adventure continues as he learns why squirrels bury nuts & how ducks float. Blippi & FETCH also help their new friends, like when they work together to rebuild a blue jay's nest!

programme.title: E1 - A Magical Day of Make-Believe!
programme.desc: Get ready for a magical day of make-believe with Baby John & his family! First, Baby John is dressed in shark pajamas & doesn't want to brush his teeth, so Daddy has to make it a fun game! Then, Baby John & Manny pretend to be rival farmers with outlandish animals like tigers & dinosaurs on their farms. The make-believe continues as Jill gets a new mermaid costume & Mom & Dad dress up as pirates to convince her to finally take it off for a bath!

programme.title: E2 - Healthy Habits & Happy You!
programme.desc: It's time to learn some healthy habits to keep you happy! First, Grandma Mei makes sure everyone washes their hands with lots of bubbles before eating some yummy dumplings. Then, when Baby Izzy doesn't want to eat her vegetables, Mei uses a bit of magic to make the veggies come to life to sing & dance! The healthy habits continue as the friends learn how to recycle trash to help save the planet & Ella learns to get right back up after getting a boo boo.

programme.title: E2 - Awesome Baby Truck Adventures!
programme.desc: Join Baby Truck for some awesome adventures at Gecko's Garage! The fun begins with a play date where Baby Truck & the Mechs take an imaginary trip to outer space, modifying Baby Truck into a rocket to explore the galaxy! Then, after getting a boo boo in the play park, the Mechanicals try to make her laugh but she can't stop giggling! The adventure ends when Mummy Truck is exhausted & Gecko gives her a spa day while Baby Truck has a fun art class with Grandma.

programme.title: E2 - Pirate Songs & Fun Beach Games!
programme.desc: Ahoy, mateys! Join JJ for pirate songs & fun beach games! The adventure begins when JJ & Wally play pirates on the high seas but can't agree on where to find the hidden treasure! Then, when a wave washes away their sandcastle, a little crab helps them try again to build one that's nearly indestructible. The pirate fun continues as Wally tries to swipe JJ's five little duckies during bath time, leading to a sudsy chase to find the ducknapper!

programme.title: E4 - Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Join Buster for a big day of soccer! He's excited to play, but learns that being a team player is the real way to win. Help Buster overcome his nerves, score a goal, and show that having fun with friends is the best prize of all!

programme.title: E2 - The Ultimate Arpo vs Squirrel Showdown!
programme.desc: It's the ultimate showdown between Arpo & his arch-nemesis, the Squirrel! The trouble multiplies when the squirrel uses a ray gun to create an army of clones that fills the house. Then, the battle for food continues as the squirrel tries to steal a freshly baked apple pie & tasty food from a picnic BBQ. The showdown gets truly bizarre when the squirrel gets trapped inside Arpo & takes control of the robot's body, causing all sorts of confusing chaos for the family!

programme.title: E5 - Mystery In Cuero
programme.desc: When Pam Shelly, 31, is found in her Cuero, Texas, bathroom with a fatal gunshot wound to the head, her death is initially ruled a suicide.

programme.title: E6 - Sunflower Fields Forever
programme.desc: The Royal Malaysia Police forensics team faces their biggest task to date when MH17 is shot down in war-torn eastern Ukraine. How can they bring the victims home to their loved ones amidst the fighting?

programme.title: E4 - Hot Summer Night
programme.desc: One of the summer season's seminal events, the Hot Summer Nights classic car show, rolls into town for a day of fun, but things turn really hot that night when there is an outbreak of bar fights.

programme.title: E13 - Monterey Park Shooting
programme.desc: On the eve of Lunar New Year, a mass shooting shatters a California dance studio, leaving investigators to unravel how jealousy and resentment escalated into one of the deadliest attacks.

programme.title: E7 - Arthur Shawcross: The Genesee River Killer
programme.desc: Arthur Shawcross tells a lot of stories about his life before he began to kill. He might have been known for killing women along Rochester's Genesee River, but his first murder was years earlier.

programme.desc: When the body of a Jane Doe is found dumped on a roadside, it's up to Dr. Satish Chundru to identify her and find out how she died, spawning an investigation retracing the victim's last night.

programme.title: E6 - Horror In Starkville Mississippi
programme.desc: When Betty Jones, 65, and Kathryn Crigler, 81, are brutally attacked in a 1990 home invasion, the tiny community of Starkville, MS, is left living in fear.

programme.title: E13 - Monterey Park Shooting
programme.desc: On the eve of Lunar New Year, a mass shooting shatters a California dance studio, leaving investigators to unravel how jealousy and resentment escalated into one of the deadliest attacks.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In China III
programme.desc: Chit the Kick breaks his leg in the fight with Wong Fey Hong, and is discarded by godfather Chao. Wong nurses him and teams up with him in a martial arts tournament to defeat Chao...

programme.title: Superstars Sunday: The Hand Of Death
programme.desc: The Shaolin Temple is the center of Chinese martial arts and the cradle of anti-Manchu patriots in the 17th century. However, a Shaolin renegade Shih has defected to the Manchu and is leading a suppression of patriots trying to overthrow the Qing Dynasty. Tan Hsiung, a patriot, is arrested and killed by Shih. The Shaolin Abbot thus calls on his best student, Yun Fei to stop Shih from killing more people. Yun happens to find help from another anti-Manchu patriot, Tan, who is actually Tan Hsiung's younger brother. Along with help of Zorro, a master swordsman...

programme.title: Her Vengeance
programme.desc: Chieh-ying, the head of a Macau dancing group, has a peaceful and calm life. One day, five drunken men, who were the murderers of Chieh-ying's dad, came to watch the show and had a brawl with Chieh-ying. On her way home, Chieh-ying got caught. She was raped and tortured by them. After that, Chieh-ying felt herself sick and was contracted the venereal disease. Therefore, she decided to go to Hong Kong to seek vengeance. She met a journalist and stayed at his home. To earn a living, Chieh-ying worked as a barmaid at a bar of Chow, her sister's ex-boyfriend with the help from Susan. One evening, Chieh-ying saw one of those five men when she was on the way to work. Susan lured him away so Chieh-ying could kill him. Chieh-ying then started a trail of bloody revenge...

programme.title: With Or Without You
programme.desc: Police detective Ming loses his gun during a drunken binge and attempts to recover it while romancing PR girl Tweedy. That's the gist of the first two-thirds of the slackly-paced story, which is enlivened by a gun battle, a chase on foot through speeding cars, and comic relief provided by Ming's partner. Things really heat up, though, when Tweedy's old boyfriend Prince, a psychotic killer, comes back to town...

programme.title: The Miracle Fighters
programme.desc: Two elderly Taoist priests, Chi Men and Dun Jia, who learn their magic from the same teacher always quarrel with each other. They provide mirth and expert kung fu tuition to young man who is mistakenly presumed to be the crown prince of the Imperial Court, missing since childhood. The emperor dispatches an eunuch with the magic powers to apprehend the young man. But he must first deal with Chi Men and Dun Jia who are the young man's protector...

programme.title: The Hand Of Death
programme.desc: The Shaolin Temple is the center of Chinese martial arts and the cradle of anti-Manchu patriots in the 17th century. However, a Shaolin renegade Shih has defected to the Manchu and is leading a suppression of patriots trying to overthrow the Qing Dynasty. Tan Hsiung, a patriot, is arrested and killed by Shih. The Shaolin Abbot thus calls on his best student, Yun Fei to stop Shih from killing more people. Yun happens to find help from another anti-Manchu patriot, Tan, who is actually Tan Hsiung's younger brother. Along with help of Zorro, a master swordsman...

programme.title: Summer Holiday
programme.desc: Summer flies to an island to sell a resort that is invested by her and her cousin. She meets Momocha who claims to be the authentic owner of the hotel. They begin a battle of love...

programme.title: A Taste of Killing and Romance
programme.desc: Judge was one of the top killers of ICE's syndicate. Mr. Tung Fai, a super cop attempted to sue the Triad head, Godfather “Tiger”. Unfortunately, his witness gave false testimony. Worst still, the witness was shot by Judge who impersonated as the presiding Judge in the law court. Meanwhile, Judge met Ru-fung, sister of Ice and both fell in love. The two killers understood they could not have true love. They decided to enjoy love for 3 days, and then separate and return to their killing carrier again.

programme.title: E8 - Perfect Mom
programme.desc: Brenda meets Kelly’s mother, who she thinks is the perfect mother, but Kelly becomes upset with her mother after she discovers she did cocaine and drank at the fashion show.

NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Ici l'Europe : on en débat
programme.desc: Un rendez-vous hebdomadaire qui propose un entretien avec une personnalité européenne de premier plan, suivi d'un débat entre eurodéputés.

programme.title: L'info du jour[Live]
programme.desc: Un éclairage sur un événement marquant de l'actualité du jour, sélectionné pour sa portée et ses implications. Décrypté avec du recul, il permet de comprendre les enjeux sous-jacents, les conséquences possibles et les dynamiques qui façonnent le monde d'aujourd'hui.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. programme.title: E25
programme.desc: Nobunaga's new castle, Azuchi, is completed. At a celebratory banquet, he orders sumo bouts and, unexpectedly, assigns senior retainers to face the young page Mori Ran (Ichikawa danko). What begins as entertainment takes a shocking turn when they are swiftly defeated and Nobunaga orders their exile. As Koichiro and Hideyoshi try to make sense of the decision, Mitsuhide begins to reveal Nobunaga's true intention.

programme.title: E66
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E127
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. programme.title: E5 - Provence: Land Of Excellence

programme.title: E8 - Nathalie Lasselin, Diving Guide In France
programme.desc: In France, Nathalie Lasselin welcomes cave diving enthusiasts. Together they explore an abandoned limestone quarry in Saint-Meme-les-Carrieres, before discovering the famous Le Ressel cave. Renowned for its incredible network of underground karst passages, the Lot is one of the world's leading areas for cave diving.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rts:2025-2026
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: E12 - Enora, Captain Mom
programme.desc: On board merchant navy ships, women are few, especially in officer positions. At Genavir, the maritime company of Ifremer, Enora is an exception: she is the first female captain.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S8
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. programme.title: E21 - Special Guesthouse
programme.desc: While walking the Camino de Santiago, Christele and Hubert never imagined their lives would radically change during a stop in Lectoure, in the Gers. They fell in love with an old building, abandoned for nearly thirty years, and restored it.

programme.title: E42 - Hide And Seek
programme.desc: It's time for a family game of hide and seek. Everyone hides, while Bluey counts to twenty, but will she be able to stay focused on the game and not get distracted by all her toys.

programme.title: E18 - Andy And The Hippos
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout explore the Okavango Delta, Africa, in search of hippos. Along the way, Andy hitches a ride with an oxpecker and gets stuck in the mud with fighting hippos.

programme.title: E19 - Andy And The Piraputanga
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to the Amazon rainforest on a global adventure to discover how piraputanga fish feed on berries above the water's surface.

programme.title: E7 - The Sibling Badge
programme.desc: Roly reveals he's expecting a new baby brother or sister, and the Squirrels have questions.

programme.title: E8 - The Monster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to help Plinky find her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: E9 - The Diary Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels find a dusty, old book behind a cupboard... it's Duggee's diary from when he was a teenager! The Squirrels are keen to write diaries of their own.

programme.title: E24 - Ready Or Not
programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let's play Hide and Seek!

programme.title: E25 - Dr. Catastrophe
programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.title: E1 - Ghostbasket - Bluey Special Trilogy Episode 1
programme.desc: Bluey special trilogy episode 1 - Dad is pretending to be an estate agent selling the Grannies' house to Mum, but Janet and Rita do not want to move out. They try to disrupt the sale by ambushing Mum in the hallway, driving their car through the kitchen and introducing Ghostbasket - a ghastly haunted washing basket.

programme.title: E20 - Out Of Site
programme.desc: Brenda learns that it is important to work as a team and not just care about her own jobs.

programme.title: E18 - Mojo Drop The Ball
programme.desc: Preston needs to knock down his shed, and Mojo has the wrecking ball to do it. But first, Mojo and Bo have to get it all the way across town, which is harder than it sounds!

programme.title: E19 - Joist Hoist
programme.desc: There's a girder out of place on Swoppiton Bridge, and unless Nori can fix it, that bridge is coming down! Luckily, Mojo's got the tops, and Bo's got the skills to help get it done.

programme.title: E5 - Operation Jewel
programme.desc: Evil Pea steals Tomato's precious jewel. Supertato ventures to get it back by secretly lifting the jewel from Evil Pea's crown and defeating a crowd of rampaging Mini Peas.

programme.title: E6 - The Baddie Belt
programme.desc: Evil Pea swaps Supertato's Tato-Belt with her evil Baddie-Belt which has absurd and baffling functions. Supertato has to work out how to rescue Carrot and Pea with the Baddie Belt.

programme.title: E24 - Ready Or Not
programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let's play Hide and Seek!

programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.title: E1 - The Carrot Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are admiring Duggee's crop of giant carrots when they hear a noise. They find the Rabbits busy preparing for the Carrot Solstice.

programme.title: E20 - The Midnight Badge
programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.title: E13 - Pass The Parcel
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.desc: After a rainbow appears over the Go Jet Academy, Glitch becomes fascinated with the legend of a pot of gold appearing at the end of it.

programme.desc: The Go Jetters are watching for polar bears, but an iceberg is heading for their ship!

programme.desc: Sarah, Duck & Bug set off on a big adventure, through uncharted territory, as they attempt to cycle all the way around the park.

programme.desc: The talking animals talk about all the things they love about the ocean.

programme.title: Can Ai, Drones, And Robots Keep Football Fans Safe?
programme.desc: Packed football stadiums and high emotions pose security risks. From AI to drones and robot dogs, technology promises more control, yet also raises questions about risks and limits.

programme.title: Beating India's Heat - With An Ancient Cooling Hack
programme.desc: In Delhi's brutal heatwaves, a low-cost, 3000-year-old cooling method is saving lives. Plus: The women in Kerala who mapped tidal flooding to force change.

programme.title: Romania - Torn Between Work And Home
programme.desc: In the 1990s, many Romanians left their homeland in search of work. They left behind deserted villages: children were raised by their grandparents, the elderly lived alone, and communities fell apart.

programme.title: Between Soccer And Politics: Iran At The 2026 World Cup
programme.desc: Iran's World Cup appearance has been overshadowed by the military conflict with the U.S., as politics takes center stage at the football tournament.

programme.title: Understand The World, One Story At A Time
programme.desc: Our deep dive format explains the stories that matter - with clarity, context and journalistic rigor. Each segment goes beyond the headlines to uncover what's driving key developments around the world, featuring sharp analysis, expert voices and exclusive on the ground insights from where events are unfolding.

programme.title: Can Ai, Drones, And Robots Keep Football Fans Safe?
programme.desc: Packed football stadiums and high emotions pose security risks. From AI to drones and robot dogs, technology promises more control, yet also raises questions about risks and limits.

programme.title: From Genz Protests To Presidency: Can Boniface Mwangi Lead Kenya?
programme.desc: He bled with Gen Z on the streets of Nairobi. Now he wants their votes. Live from Bonn's historic World Conference Center, Mimi and George put Kenya's loudest activist-turned-politician in the hot seat.

programme.title: Between Soccer And Politics: Iran At The 2026 World Cup

programme.title: E2 - You Play With Fire, You Might Get Burned
programme.desc: Tensions mount in Cayuga as a frightening crash occurs on the drag strip moments before Chris is set to perform his incredibly dangerous first night race of the season alongside his still untested Crew Chief, Wayner.

programme.title: E3 - Highlight 3
programme.desc: Crouch Recovery Op Jim and heavy mechanic Jack are faced with an increasingly complex recovery challenge. A foreign truck with dodgy suspension airbags and a catalogue of other problems makes towing it anywhere a real headache and a potential threat to other road users. Lantern Recovery op Sean is in a race against time to get a fully loaded dual tanker off a busy stretch of motorway. And recovery op Merrie has a nightmare when an unforeseeable problem leaves her stranded in a live lane of the motorway when towing a car transporter.

programme.title: E2 - Rob Brydon
programme.desc: Funny man Rob Brydon joins Bear Grylls for an adventure he won’t forget as he takes on a mission in the Mountains of Snowdonia.

programme.title: E1 - Legendary Predators (Lions)
programme.desc: Coyote explores the power of lions and asks: Would you hold paws with the King of the Jungle?

programme.title: E2 - Speed and Showdown (Cheetah & Jaguar)
programme.desc: Witness a meeting with a cheetah and the ultimate showdown between a jaguar and a caiman.

programme.title: E8 - Hyrox
programme.desc: The hottest new sport of hybrid games sweeping the world is Hyrox, so the team puts their fitness to the test in Melbourne.

programme.title: E9 - Obstacle Enduro
programme.desc: Matt takes the team through a 6 hour obstacle enduro at Raw Challenge on the Gold Coast before the series wrap-up and the announcement of our Most Savage for the season.

programme.title: E11 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.title: E6 - Drew and Cindy With Tom
programme.desc: Friends and bandmates Cindy and Drew look for a Yukon property with mountain views, rehearsal space and a workshop.

programme.title: E1 - Legendary Predators (Lions)
programme.desc: Coyote explores the power of lions and asks: Would you hold paws with the King of the Jungle?

programme.title: E2 - Speed and Showdown (Cheetah & Jaguar)
programme.desc: Witness a meeting with a cheetah and the ultimate showdown between a jaguar and a caiman.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 3x World Surf Champion turned wildlife conservationist Mick Fanning teams up with leading experts in new documentary SAVE THIS SHARK. Mick Fanning is on a new mission to explore shark conservation. The 3x world surfing champion will hop around the world teaming up with experts and conservationists to uncover the hidden truths about sharks, threats and how to save them from extinction. Mick will investigate the issue of sharks versus people and present problems as well as discover the latest technological solutions in how to keep both humans and sharks safe to coexist. Our host has had some incredible achievements throughout his professional career, but one moment stood out to the world live on television in 2015. A shark encounter at the J-Bay Open saw Mick Fanning become ‘the guy who punched a shark’. A huge part of saving sharks is convincing people that they need our help and putting aside the fear factor. In Save This Shark, Mick takes this incredible opportunity to go on his ow

programme.title: E10 - Southern Western Australia
programme.desc: From the towering Karri forests of Warren National Park to the ancient rock formations of The Pinnacles, Western Australia’s southern region is a treasure of natural wonders. In the final installment of Experience Australia, we highlight the best experiences for visitors to this magical region. Explore the pristine coastline and cuddly wildlife residents of Rottnest Island, immerse yourself in an indigenous cultural experience at Yanchep National Park, and embark on a thrilling sea voyage to encounter the elusive killer whale.

Saajan Ki Baahon Mein
programme.desc: Sagar is ready to marry Kavita when he meets Sapna, his former love who is set to marry his childhood friend and life-changing facts surface. Release Year: 1995 Director: Jayprakkash Shaw

programme.title: Baogu Produces -The Fiery First Experience of Voice Acting
programme.desc: New title of the Crayon Shinchan movie series, “Crayon Shinchan the Movie: Super-Hot! The Spicy Kasukabe Dancers”, has been released. For Hong Kong's Cantonese-dubbed version, singer Cloud Wan Ho Ying and new generation idol Phoebus Ng Kai Yeung have been invited to voice over two new characters. In this episode, Cloud and Phoebus will share the anecdotes from their dubbing experience; Phoebus will demonstrate some voice over techniques, and more behind-the-scene stories are to be told.

programme.title: A Light Never Goes Out
programme.desc: Widow Mei-heung has gone through countless sleepless nights since the death of her husband, Bill. One day, she finds a key among the items that Bill left behind, leading her to his secret neon workshop and his young apprentice, Leo. She learns from Leo that Bill had an unfulfilled last wish–to recreate a demolished legendary neon sign. With Leo's help, Mei-heung tries to uncover the story behind the sign and learns the craft of blowing neon lights in hopes of fulfilling her deceased husband's last wish with her own hands. Along the way, Mei-heung reminisces about her beautiful encounters with Bill and unearths pieces of Bill's past as if they are the last consolation left by him. Meanwhile, Mei-heung's daughter, Prism, plans to leave Hong Kong with her fiance, but she is unable to break the news to Mei-heung. As clues of the legendary neon sign gradually emerge, the secrets that Mei-heung couldn't face are about to be revealed...

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E290 -The Furious
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Virus
programme.desc: The world is under attack from an “Love virus”? Taek-seon is a translator who always feels tired, unmotivated and uninterested in romance. One day, Taek-seon has a disastrous blind date with Su-pil, a born single medical researcher who proposes on their first meeting. After the date they met, the world is suddenly enveloped in atmosphere of love... Taek-seon found herself laughing for no reason and searching for a beautiful dress, everything looks cute, even a daily promotional text from her old classmate Yeon-woo. However, Taek-seon knew that she had been infected with 100% fatality rate deadly virus -- Toxo Virus. She meets Dr. Lee Gyun, the only researcher who can create the antiviral medicine and she realizes that all these romantic feelings are symptoms of virus. Thus, her unexpected journey begins...

programme.title: Men of Plastic
programme.desc: The most glamorous part of Seoul, Apgujeong thrives with new possibilities. Dae-guk who is a native of Apgujeong and rules its ground, is eager to start his own groundbreaking plastic surgery business. Then he encounters Ji-woo, the most talented surgeon in the area who lost his medical license due to someone sabotaging his reputation. Dae-guk effortlessly comes up with an idea to make this business happen, and he does everything he can to make Ji-woo his partner. Together, Dae-guk and Ji-woo open a whole new era of Apgujeong.

programme.title: Band Four
programme.desc: “Band Four” is the story of Cat aspiring to make her mark on the global music stage, while contending with the haunting absence of her father, King, a guitarist who abandoned her and her mother two decades ago. Cat's life takes a dramatic turn when her mother succumbs to illness, and King unexpectedly appears at the funeral together with Matilda, Cat's previously unknown adolescent stepsister, further complicating Cat's ongoing struggle to raise her own 9-year-old son, Riley. Forced to live together in a crowded Hong Kong flat, the newly reunited family finds itself in a vortex of conflicting personalities, insecurities, and priorities. The family finds amidst this turmoil a common communication channel via music. Just as the familial bond begins to form through their shared musical language, both their bond and Band Four's survival are put to the test by a fresh set of unforeseen challenges.

programme.title: The Sleep Curse
programme.desc: During Japan's wartime occupation of Hong Kong in 1941-1945, a young translator's collaboration with the enemy results in his life being cursed by a murdered 'comfort woman' forced to become a sex slave. Forty-five years later, the man's sins come back to haunt his son, a professor specializing in sleeping disorders, when the lady's ghost returns for vengeance.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E290 -The Furious
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Huling Akyat Sa Torre[Live]
programme.desc: Presented by ABS-CBN News Documentaries, in celebration of ABS-CBN's 80th founding anniversary, “Huling Akyat sa Torre” (Last Ascent Up the Tower) is a 2026 documentary that zooms in on a structure that has come to symbolize the company -the Millennium Tower. Beyond its link to the history, rise, and trials of “the Philippines' largest network”, the tower is seen from the eyes of the men who have touched and climbed its heights. Journalist Anjo Bagaoisan interviews current and former engineers and technicians of their memories working with the tower that have made their mark in nearly 40 years of Philippine history. The documentary is narrated by veteran journalist and ABS-CBN News anchor Tony Velasquez.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: Radyo Patrol Balita
programme.desc: Teleradyo Program

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: E1 - Insect Apocalypse
programme.desc: Look at what a global insect decline could do to our planet. Uncover our historical dependence on these tiny animals, the vital roles they play in our ecosystems, and the reasons why our fragile relationship to them is in danger worldwide.

programme.title: E4 - Beetle Mania
programme.desc: Get a sanitation lesson from nature’s original cleanup crew. Learn how beetles keep ecosystems in balance with clever biological weapons like tusks and toxic sprays, then see why the 6,000-plus species of dung beetles are the world’s unsung heroes.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: E4 - South America
programme.desc: Learn how South America’s rich diversity of weather fuels an even richer diversity of life. Examine the Amazon rainforest’s oxygen-breathing trees, follow the arc of a vast cloud river, and meet flamingos that thrive in the sun’s scorching UV rays.

programme.title: E1 - Insect Apocalypse
programme.desc: Look at what a global insect decline could do to our planet. Uncover our historical dependence on these tiny animals, the vital roles they play in our ecosystems, and the reasons why our fragile relationship to them is in danger worldwide.

programme.title: E4 - Beetle Mania
programme.desc: Get a sanitation lesson from nature’s original cleanup crew. Learn how beetles keep ecosystems in balance with clever biological weapons like tusks and toxic sprays, then see why the 6,000-plus species of dung beetles are the world’s unsung heroes.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: E4 - South America
programme.desc: Learn how South America’s rich diversity of weather fuels an even richer diversity of life. Examine the Amazon rainforest’s oxygen-breathing trees, follow the arc of a vast cloud river, and meet flamingos that thrive in the sun’s scorching UV rays.

programme.title: E1 - Realm of Volcanoes
programme.desc: Bask in the interconnected lives of wildlife shaped by volcanoes, forests, and seas. Take flight with rare Philippine eagles as they raise their young in an ancient tree, then dive into a river to catch a glimpse of the world’s rarest crocodile.

programme.title: E3 - Rocco, Harold and Cindy
programme.desc: Follow Shanet, who spends her days tending to the needs of Harold Custard the rockhopper penguin, and feel the love as Barista cares for Cindy the baboon in her golden years. Later, say an emotional goodbye as Rocco the wombat returns to the wild.

programme.title: E2 - Rumble in the Jungle
programme.desc: Tune into the natural world and explore frequencies beyond human hearing, like the gentle hum of giraffes in the evening, or creatures who use song to claim territory on a seemingly silent coral reef.

programme.title: E5 - Boreal
programme.desc: Travel to the Arctic for a peek at the brutal challenges of life in the boreal forest, then admire some stellar animal adaptations. Witness a secret reindeer superpower, navigate a rodent labyrinth of snow, and learn why moose are gourmets at heart.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 鷹野爪子是一名外表聰明幹練、聲音沉穩的女子。她充滿自信，同時謙遜有禮，充滿王牌風範。雖然看似能幹，但其實非常無能。另一方面，鷹野的同期鶸田道人則是和爪子完全相反，是個外表看似無能實則十分能幹的可憐上班族。這樣的他，卻被迫成為在公司內部終日無所事事的鷹野的搭檔，開始了極其不幸的職場生活。

Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, “CNBC Meets” is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, “CNBC Meets” is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 聚焦產業振興、生態保護、鄉村振興等，深入解讀百千萬工程如何引領廣東逐步縮小城鄉差距，促進區域均衡發展，並通過鮮活的人物故事，細膩呈現三年來南粵大地山海之間發生的精彩蝶變。

programme.title: E1 - 潘瑋柏岳雲鵬以「味」論英雄
programme.desc: 以「中國食材」為題，匯集近百位廚師，分為聲名顯赫的「星級廚師」以及風格迥異的「民間廚師」兩大陣營，釋出渾身解數，通過多重廚藝關卡比拼廚技，與潘瑋柏、岳雲鵬、劉濤、孟佳等炙熱評審共同見證「年度廚王」的誕生。

programme.title: E1 - 潘瑋柏岳雲鵬以「味」論英雄
programme.desc: 以「中國食材」為題，匯集近百位廚師，分為聲名顯赫的「星級廚師」以及風格迥異的「民間廚師」兩大陣營，釋出渾身解數，通過多重廚藝關卡比拼廚技，與潘瑋柏、岳雲鵬、劉濤、孟佳等炙熱評審共同見證「年度廚王」的誕生。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫
